title: Cherries and Cream Scones
ingredients: 6 tablespoons chilled, unsalted butter, cut into 12 pieces
instructions: Combine flour, sugar, and salt in a large bowl.
Cut in the chilled butter pieces using a pastry blender or your fingers until the dough resembles coarse meal.
Stir in the heavy cream lightly with a fork.
Transfer dough onto a lightly floured surface and sprinkle with 2-3 tablespoons flour.
Gently roll dough into a round about 3/4 to 1 inch thick.
Using a 3-inch heart-shaped cookie cutter, cut out scones and place them on ungreased baking sheets about 2 inches apart.
Bake until pale golden, about 15 minutes.
Serve warm with freshly whipped cream and raspberry jam.
notes: This recipe is from dear friend Cheryl Peirce.
Homemade raspberry freezer jam is best for serving.
